query:
SELECT 
            er.id,
            s.name as subject,
            er.grade,
            e.weight_percentage as weight,
            e.description
        FROM exam_results er
        JOIN exams e ON er.exam_id = e.id
        JOIN events ev ON e.event_id = ev.id
        JOIN subjects s ON ev.subject_id = s.id
        WHERE er.student_id = $1
